case_title: LUETZOW INDUSTRIES vs. IN KOO CHO DBA CORLAND CLEANERS et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-02-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-02-1995, OSC FOR PLAINTIFF: WHY THE COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS ACTION FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE CASE AND FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 10/2/95. HEARING SET FOR DEC-01-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-01-1995, DISMISSAL PER CCP 581(C) ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-26-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-26-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-25-1995 CONTINUED FROM JUL-26-1995 TO AUG-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
